The rain hammered against the window, a relentless rhythm that seemed to mock my efforts to stay cozy inside. It felt like the storm was trying to pull me out, whispering secrets of adventure and freedom. 


I snuggled deeper into my blanket, seeking comfort in the warmth, even as the storm raged on outside. 
I wasn't ready to give in, but the wildness of the night called to me like an old friend.
